Review this draft ticket plan. Return concise findings labeled BLOCKING,
IMPORTANT, or APPROVED. Do not rewrite the plan.

Story: Add governed Jira ticket planning.
Subtask A: "Implement it". Scope: "all files". Non-goals: none. Acceptance:
"works". Validation: none. Allowed paths: "**". ADR: none.
Subtask B: "Create Jira tickets". Depends on "missing-task". Scope: "write
Jira". Acceptance: "tickets exist". Validation: "manual". Allowed paths:
"internal". ADR: "No ADR needed: unknown".

Expected blocking findings: missing field-level source traceability, unbounded
scope/path, missing measurable validation, missing ADR rationale, and invalid
dependency. A plan with these defects must not be approved.
